raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch wedde manni
eeꞥſch to ahreju Pagalmu / un
redſi/ tur bija Kambart/un wee-
na Grihde / kas Pagalmã bija
darrita wifeapkahrt/ us to Grih-
di bija trihṣdefmits Kambari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Unta Grihde bija fahnis
tahm Wahrtim/to Wahrtu Gar-
xunam pretti / fchi bija ta leijas
Grihde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch mehroja to
Plattumu no ta Preeſsch Galla
to leijas Wahrtu/ us ta eeſcheja
Pagalmja Preeſschu no ahre-
nes/ ſints Ohlektis/ prett Rihta
Puſſi un prett Seemeta Puſſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahṣ Wahrtis / kas
prett Seemeta Puſſi bija/ pee
ta ahreja Pagalmja / tur meh-
roja wiꞥſch to paſcho Garrumu/
un winno Plattumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Kambari/
trihs no schhs Puſſes un trihs
no winnas Puſſes. Un winnu
Margas un winnu Preeſsch-
Nammi bija pehz to pirmaju
Wahrtu Mehra / peezdefmits
Ohlektis bija winnu Garrums/
un diwidefmits peezas Ohlektis
winnu Plattums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Lohgi/ un win-
nu Preeſsch-Nammi/ un winnu
Palma-Kohki bija pehz to Wahr-
tu Mehra/ kas us to Zettu prett
Rihta Puſſi bija/ kur pa fepti-
karin Pakahpebm bij jakahyj/
un winnu Preeſsch-Nammi bija
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta eeſcheja Paga
ja Wahrtis bija tahm Wahrtim lihds Wahrtim
prett Seemeta Puſſi un Ri
Puſſi pretti/ un wiꞥſch meh-
no Wahrtim lihds Wahrtim
fints Ohlektis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to wedde wi-
manni us to Zettu prett Deen
Widdus Puſſi/ un raugi/
bija Wahrtis prett Deen
Widdus Puſſi/ un wiꞥſch u
roja to patchu Margas un n
nu Preeſsch-Nammius pehz
obtro Mehru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahm bij arridsan
gi pee winno Preeſsch-N
meem witsapkahrt/ itt ka to
tru Lohgi/ tas Garrums
peezdefmits Ohlektis / un
Plattums diwidefmits peezas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Uskahpja
bija feptinas Pakahpes/ un n
na Preeſsch-Nammi bija us n
no Preeſschu/ un Palmu-K
btja pee winnu Margah
weens no schhs un weens not
ras Puſſes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir Wahrtis bija eeſch
Pagalina prett Deenas-W
nas Puſſi / un wiꞥſch meh-
no Wahrtim lihds tahm Wahrtim
prett Deenas-Widdus Pa-
fints Ohlektis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl wedde wiꞥſch m
ni zaar Deenas-Widdus W-
tim us to eeſcheju Pagal-
nn wiꞥſch mehroja tahs Deen
Widdus Wahrtis pehz to ob
Mehra.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
